formula: var vals=(inputs.values||'').split(',').map(function(v){return parseFloat(v.trim());}).filter(function(v){return !isNaN(v);});vals.sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});var n=vals.length;var getQ=function(p){var pos=(n-1)*p+1;var base=Math.floor(pos)-1;var rest=pos-base-1;if(base+1>=n)return vals[n-1];return vals[base]+rest*(vals[base+1]-vals[base]);};return{q1:getQ(0.25).toFixed(4),q2:getQ(0.5).toFixed(4),q3:getQ(0.75).toFixed(4),iqr:(getQ(0.75)-getQ(0.25)).toFixed(4)};
result_context: Cuartiles: Q1 = {q1}, Q2 (mediana) = {q2}, Q3 = {q3}. Rango intercuartil (IQR) = {iqr}.
result_context_en: Quartiles: Q1 = {q1}, Q2 (median) = {q2}, Q3 = {q3}. Interquartile range (IQR) = {iqr}.
result_context_fr: Quartiles : Q1 = {q1}, Q2 (médiane) = {q2}, Q3 = {q3}. Écart interquartile (IQR) = {iqr}.
result_context_pt: Quartis: Q1 = {q1}, Q2 (mediana) = {q2}, Q3 = {q3}. Intervalo interquartil (IQR) = {iqr}.
result_context_it: Quartili: Q1 = {q1}, Q2 (mediana) = {q2}, Q3 = {q3}. Intervallo interquartile (IQR) = {iqr}.
formula_display: Q1 = valor en posición (n+1)/4, Q2 = mediana, Q3 = valor en 3(n+1)/4
steps: Introducir el valor de values
Verificar que los valores introducidos están en el rango y formato correctos
Calcular los valores de q1 y q2
Verificar que el resultado es coherente con los valores de entrada
El resultado puede usarse como dato intermedio para cálculos posteriores más complejos
mistakes: Confundir la fórmula con la de otra figura geométrica similar
Usar el radio en lugar del diámetro (o viceversa) en la fórmula
No verificar que las unidades sean consistentes antes de operar

es.name: Cuartiles

es.example_label: Calculate the quartiles Q1, Q2, Q3 and IQR for the dataset.

range_hints.values: Comma-separated numbers: -1e9 to 1e9, minimum 4 values recommended

es.result_context: Quartiles divide data: Q1={q1}, Q2(median)={q2}, Q3={q3}, IQR={iqr}.
es.formula_display: Q1 = 25th percentile, Q2 = 50th percentile, Q3 = 75th percentile, IQR = Q3 - Q1
steps: Q1 at position (10-1)×0.25+1 = 3.25: interpolate between 18 and 22
Q2 at position 5.5: average of 28 and 35
Q3 at position (10-1)×0.75+1 = 7.75: interpolate between 42 and 48
mistakes: Using different quartile calculation methods inconsistently
Not sorting data before calculating quartiles
Confusing IQR with range (max-min)

input_type_review.reason: Correct - text allows comma-separated list of numbers
